column66: Jun 30: Quaintance (knee) won't play in the Summer League, per NBA reporter Matthew Tynan.
Jul 8: Gardner (ankle) won't participate in the Las Vegas Summer League, per Ira Winderman of the South Florida Sun Sentinel.
Jul 11: Murray-Boyles (finger) has been ruled out for Friday's Summer League game against the Celtics, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.
Jul 11: Martin is out for Friday's Las Vegas Summer League game against the Celtics due to knee inflammation, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.
